use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS products and modern web applications
Full-width hero with animated accents and statistics for conversion-focused pages
Minimalist hero component with customizable branding elements for product launches
Hero section with call-to-action buttons for marketing and portfolio sites
Modern animated hero with grid background for tech and startup landing pages
ai_summary: A minimal modern hero section component with a clean white background, subtle grid pattern, and animated accent elements. Features customizable logo, badge, title, description, dual CTA buttons, and statistics display. Uses Framer Motion for smooth animations including a gradient accent line and rotating accent circle. Fully responsive and themeable with accent color customization.
